MOTION For Order That The Genuineness Of Docs & Truth Of Facts Be Admitted & Compelling Responses To Interrogatories & Production Of Docs & For Monetary Sanctions Including Attys' Fees
Off Calendar Apr-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Stanley Tulchin Associates Western Incorporated's motion for an order to deem certain matters admitted is denied as responses have been served. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection by May 5, 2006. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $590 are to be paid on or before May 5, 2006. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2006 Set For Trial On Jul-31-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jul-13-06 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 608
